name: Bug report

---

***Please** use this template when reporting a bug. **If you follow the questionnaire, it is more likely that I am able to reproduce the issue and do something about it.** Using the template will prevent you from having to **wait longer** for a fix because I did not have enough info to work on it when I sat down for a "bugfixing session", and it will prevent me from having to go back to you and ask for clarification. If not all questions apply to your issue or you can't answer them all, no problem, leave this question out. But **don't skip the template** entirely!*

**Describe the bug**
*A clear description of what the issue is. *Doesn't work* is **not** a clear description!
(Example of information I want here: Is something missing after the import, or is something imported incorrectly? If yes, what is wrong exactly? Did you get error messages? Screenshot them! Crashes? Is the issue specific to a certain id3 file? If yes, which one?*

**Screenshots**
*If you can show the issue in a screenshot, include one! It's super easy, just copy-paste the image into Github. Images often say 100 times more than words!*

**To Reproduce**
*If the issue can be reproduced, I want to do it. So I need the info on how to reproduce it!
Which i3d file were you importing? Provide folder / file name if it was a base game asset, so I can have a look at it myself. If not base game, where did you get it?
When did the problem occur? Is the import failing, or is it only visible in GE after re-exporting?*

**Additional info:**
 - Which Add-On version are you using? 
 - Which game version were you importing an object for? FS22, FS25....
 - Blender Version? [e.g. 5.1]
